/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvive_tracker_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libvive_tracker_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/vive_tracker_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vive_tracker_interfaces/srv/detail/vive_calibration__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
